social.title: What restaurant owners are saying
social.subtitle: Real voices from operators using FlowingPost

testimonials.name: Marco R.
testimonials.text: I used to spend 3 hours a week on Instagram. Now I take a photo of the daily special and FlowingPost does the rest. Game changer.

testimonials.name: Lisa K.
testimonials.text: Finally I'm consistently on social media without it feeling like work. My guests now tell me: 'I found you on Instagram!'

testimonials.name: Yusuf A.
testimonials.text: Perfect for me as a bartender — quick photo of a drink in the evening, and by morning it's on 5 platforms. Brutally efficient.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: My social media was completely dead before. Since FlowingPost I post 5x per week — and Instagram reservations have doubled.

testimonials.name: Thomas W.
testimonials.text: We manage 3 restaurants with one upload. The AI writes fitting captions for each location. Saves us easily 8 hours per week.

testimonials.name: Elena D.
testimonials.text: I'm no social media expert — but with FlowingPost my feed looks like it's from an agency. And at a fraction of the cost.

testimonials.name: Anna B.
testimonials.text: Every morning a photo of the fresh rolls — and by evening we have 3 new posts on Instagram, Facebook and TikTok. Just works.

testimonials.name: Daniel F.
testimonials.text: My burger photos finally get the reach they deserve. I never had time for social media before — now the AI handles it.

testimonials.name: Mike S.
testimonials.text: As a food trucker I'm always on the move. Take a photo, upload, done. FlowingPost even knows which hashtags are trending.

testimonials.name: Jan H.
testimonials.text: I now post our tap changes to 4 platforms in 30 seconds. Our regulars love staying up to date.

testimonials.name: Kenji T.
testimonials.text: The AI writes captions that actually sound like us. No generic marketing speak — authentic and on point.

testimonials.name: Nisa P.
testimonials.text: Since using FlowingPost, new guests come in saying: 'I saw you on TikTok!' That was unthinkable before.

testimonials.name: Julia V.
testimonials.text: Perfect for our small team. No social media manager needed — the AI understands our brand and our vegan community.

testimonials.name: Sophie L.
testimonials.text: Every evening a photo of the wine of the day — by morning it's on all channels with a perfect caption. My followers love it.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.a: We set everything up within 24 hours. You get a personal login and are ready to go immediately — no technical knowledge required.
No. You upload a photo, optionally write a short note — everything else happens automatically. No coding, no setup, no hassle.

items.q: Which platforms are included in which plan?
items.a: Starter (€39/month): up to 3 platforms of your choice (e.g. Instagram, TikTok, Facebook). Growth (€79/month): up to 6 platforms. Pro (€149/month): all 9 platforms at once (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, YouTube and more). You can upgrade anytime.

items.q: Do I have to plan when posts go out?
items.a: No. The system handles that automatically. You upload photos — the Auto-Scheduler controls when, how often, and on which platforms posts go out. You never have to touch the calendar.
Yes, anytime. Monthly plans can be cancelled without notice. Yearly plans run for 12 months and renew automatically — you can cancel anytime before the renewal date.
Yes. Upgrade from Starter to Growth or Pro anytime — you only pay the difference. Downgrade is possible at the next billing cycle.

items.q: Does the AI also write in English or other languages?
items.a: Yes. The AI writes in any language — German, English, Turkish, Arabic and more. Just specify during setup.
The first 50 customers pay no setup fee — normally €99. The offer is valid until all 50 spots are taken, then we return to the regular price.

items.q: Do scheduled posts perform as well as manual ones?
items.a: Yes. Scheduled posts perform just as well as manually published ones. Modern algorithms evaluate the relevance and quality of content — not whether someone manually clicked "Post". Consistency is actually an advantage.

items.q: Is this safe for my social media accounts?
items.a: Yes. We exclusively use the official, verified APIs from Instagram, TikTok, Facebook and others — no scraping, no bots, no workarounds. Your accounts are 100% protected.

items.q: How much time do I really save?
items.a: Our users report up to 90% time savings compared to manual posting across multiple platforms. Instead of 2–4 hours per week: upload a photo, done.

cta.title: Ready to switch?
cta.subtitle: Start with FlowingPost now and save hours every week. No setup fee for the first 50 customers.
cta.note: Cancel anytime · No credit card required

items.q: Can I switch from Later to FlowingPost?
items.a: Yes, switching is easy. Sign up for FlowingPost, connect your social media accounts and you're ready to go. No data export needed — FlowingPost creates new, AI-generated captions for your photos.

items.q: Is FlowingPost really cheaper than Hootsuite?
items.a: Yes. Hootsuite starts at $99/month. FlowingPost starts at €39/month and includes AI captions, auto-scheduler and up to 9 platforms — features that cost significantly more with Hootsuite.

items.q: What happens to my scheduled posts on Buffer?
items.a: Your existing posts on Buffer stay active until they're posted. You can start FlowingPost in parallel. Once you're satisfied, simply cancel Buffer.

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge to switch?
items.a: No. FlowingPost is as easy as uploading a photo. We set everything up within 24 hours — you get a personal login and are ready to go immediately.

items.q: Can FlowingPost post in English or other languages?
items.a: Yes. Unlike most alternatives, FlowingPost AI writes in any language — German, English, Turkish, Arabic and more.
With other tools, you plan manually in a calendar. FlowingPost is fully automatic: upload a photo — the system decides when, how often and on which platforms to post. Zero manual effort.
